output.code:
# Let's open and read the file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-3SQFSZFTKLEGnKn2RujsWU-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]
import re, json, textwrap, itertools, unicodedata, sys, os, pprint, math

text = open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8").read()
pattern_ayah = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا * وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
[(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern_ayah), text)]

pattern_partial = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخ"
[(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern_partial), text)]

pattern_hadith = "إن الله تعالى يقول: يا ابن آدم، تفرغ لعبادتي أملأ صدرك غنى وأسد فقرك، وإن لا تفعل ملأت يديك شغلاً ولم أسد فقرك"
[(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern_hadith), text)]

# find all double-quote substrings and show their contents with indices
quote_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer('"', text)]
len(quote_positions), quote_positions[:20]

# get segments between pairs
segments = []
for i in range(0, len(quote_positions)-1, 2):
    start_q = quote_positions[i]
    end_q = quote_positions[i+1]
    segments.append((start_q, end_q, text[start_q+1:end_q]))
segments[:10], len(segments)

# Collect spans with indices and text
ayah_full_indices = [(143,230), (701,788), (1246,1333), (1791,1878), (2336,2423), (2881,2968)]
hadith_indices = [(365,475), (1005,1115), (1550,1660), (2095,2205), (2640,2750), (3185,3295)]
ayah_trunc = (3426, 3465)
spans = []
for s,e in ayah_full_indices:
    spans.append(("Aya", s,e, text[s:e]))
spans.append(("Aya", ayah_trunc[0], ayah_trunc[1], text[ayah_trunc[0]:ayah_trunc[1]]))
for s,e in hadith_indices:
    spans.append(("Hadeeth", s,e, text[s:e]))
# sort by start
spans_sorted = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x[1])
spans_sorted

citations = []
# Add full ayahs
for s,e in ayah_full_indices:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Aya"})
# Add truncated
citations.append({"span_start": ayah_trunc[0], "span_end": ayah_trunc[1], "span_text": text[ayah_trunc[0]:ayah_trunc[1]], "citation_type": "Aya"})
# Add hadiths
for s,e in hadith_indices:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
# sort by span_start
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda d: d["span_start"])
len(citations_sorted), citations_sorted[0], citations_sorted[-1]
